title: Revolve Group Q1 Earnings Summary
text: Revolve Group exceeded expectations with quarterly earnings of $0.20 per share, surpassing the consensus estimate of $0.18. This represented an earnings surprise of +9.77% and showed growth compared to $0.16 per share a year prior. The company posted revenues of $342.88 million for the quarter ended March 2026, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 4.11%. This marked an increase from $296.71 million in the year-ago period. Despite strong earnings results, Revolve Group shares have lost about 22.3% since the beginning of the year while the broader market gained 5.2%. The stock currently holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) rating, suggesting shares are expected to perform in line with the market in the near future. Analysts project $0.23 earnings per share and $334.2 million in revenues for the upcoming quarter, with full-year estimates of $0.87 per share on $1.33 billion in revenues.
